title: Tofu Bake with Pungent Flair
description: A savory tofu bake infused with the pungency of garlic and an earthy Canadian twist, perfect for a comforting dinner.

ingredients.name: Tofu
ingredients.notes: firm, drained, and cut into 1-inch cubes

instructions: Dust the tofu cubes with Canadian flour, shaking off excess.
Heat the vegetable oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the tofu until golden brown on all sides, about 3-4 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle the pungent garlic and bake seasoning over the tofu.
Return the skillet to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes.
Garnish with fresh thyme and serve hot.
